brief_html: The game has finished the countdown and has now started. Players should see a loading screen for the map once this is received.
remarks_html:
The game has finished the countdown and has now started. Players should see a loading screen for the map once this is received.

S>C [0x10] W3GS_COUNTDOWN_START should be received before this packet, even if there is no countdown or if the countdown was 0 seconds.
